purpose: Machine-readable WellFit internal source-to-implementation map. Use this registry before planning or coding concept-derived work so agents continue existing implementation areas, respect guardrails, and avoid duplicate architecture or parallel systems.

globalDoNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not create a second app shell, navigation system, mission engine, reward ledger, economy model, Buddy KI provider layer, AR event authority path, feedback pipeline, or agent-governance system.
Do not activate token, NFT, wallet, payment, presale, trading, staking, payout, betting, or final reward authority flows from concept documents.
Do not expand health, child, location, camera, privacy, consent, or compliance logic from concept documents without an explicit reviewed task.
Do not touch PR #13 or overwrite/delete Unity files under native/unity/WellFitBuddyAR.

sourceGroups.name: Master concept / Master-Bibel
alreadyStartedInRepo: App shell, dashboard, mission routes, Buddy pages, mobile routes, points shop, marketplace, leaderboard, analytics, legal/help pages, project registers, and governance files already exist.
Route, API, feature, workflow, feedback, and cross-reference registers already provide machine-readable baselines.
notYetImplemented: Full source-document taxonomy beyond current repository planning files.
Automated validation that every future concept source is linked to a leading implementation location.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Use WORK_MAP.md as the topic-to-file router; do not introduce a competing master architecture map.
Extend existing app, registry, TODO, and architecture files in small steps.

sourceGroups.name: Whitepaper / investor documents
alreadyStartedInRepo: Public landing, registration, FAQ, help, legal pages, and beta-facing product modules exist.
Economy guardrails separate internal beta points from future blockchain/token narratives.
notYetImplemented: No canonical investor whitepaper source file is registered as implementation-ready.
No live investor, token sale, purchase, payout, or regulated finance flow should be inferred from concept text.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not create a second marketing site or parallel public route structure.
Do not add financial, token-sale, presale, or investment claims without explicit legal/compliance review.

sourceGroups.name: Pre-Sale / Tokenomics documents
alreadyStartedInRepo: Internal points, XP, reward preview, spend preview, user projection, and persistence-status concepts are present as beta/draft/preview paths.
Points shop and marketplace routes exist as beta-safe internal/placeholder areas.
notYetImplemented: No real token, NFT, wallet, payment, presale, staking, trading, purchase, payout, or marketplace settlement implementation is approved.
Final ledger authority and blockchain migration remain future guarded work.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not create a parallel ledger, token service, wallet module, NFT marketplace, purchase path, or presale page.
Keep beta economy language internal/draft/preview and server-authority oriented.

sourceGroups.name: Avatar / KI-Buddy documents
supportingConceptFiles: todolist/H2 - BUDDY ALS REALER AR-BEGLEITER UND KI-GUIDE
alreadyStartedInRepo: Desktop Buddy page, mobile Buddy page, Buddy overlay components, Buddy state/care/recovery/economy/inventory helpers, and Buddy-KI API/provider files exist.
Mission-to-Buddy bridge and mobile AR Buddy preview/overlay components exist.
notYetImplemented: No final autonomous Buddy reward or mission-completion authority is allowed.
Voice interaction, production-grade model provider operations, and full AR embodied Buddy behavior are future guarded work.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not create a second Buddy state model, AI provider layer, mission recommendation engine, or avatar inventory model without reconciling existing files.
Buddy may explain and recommend; it must not authorize points, tokens, rewards, mission completion, or anti-cheat decisions.

sourceGroups.name: Spielplätze / Kinder
supportingConceptFiles: todolist/H1 - NATIVE AR - ARCORE - ARKIT - UNITY
todolist/H2 - BUDDY ALS REALER AR-BEGLEITER UND KI-GUIDE
alreadyStartedInRepo: Mobile mission, AR page, AR riddle/event libraries, and mission route scaffolds exist.
Privacy guardrails and checkpoint/location safety architecture exist for child/location-sensitive work.
notYetImplemented: No production child profile, guardian consent, playground live location, safe-zone, camera capture, face/pose/biometric, raw motion, or child-targeted tracking expansion is approved.
Real-world checkpoint generation remains guarded by safety, consent, data-minimization, fallback, human/legal/privacy review, and server authority.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not create a separate child-safety model, location model, consent model, or AR mission engine.
Do not collect child, precise location/GPS/radius/safe-zone, camera, face/pose/biometric, raw motion/sensor, or health/watch data without explicit privacy/security/legal review.
Do not use protected data as direct reward, mission-completion, anti-cheat, leaderboard, inventory, rare-item, token, payout, payment, or medical authority.

sourceGroups.name: Erwachsene / Active Breaks
supportingConceptFiles: todolist/J8.4 - MISSIONSTYPEN UND KI MISSION ENGINE ADDENDUM.md
alreadyStartedInRepo: Daily, weekly, challenge, adventure, mobile movement, and mobile analysis routes exist.
Mobile motion/native activity/Health Connect helper areas exist, with privacy guardrails.
notYetImplemented: No medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, raw health/watch data ingestion expansion, raw motion/sensor history, precise location tracking, camera/face/pose persistence, or workplace analytics pipeline is approved.
Adaptive adult mission personalization remains draft/insight-agent planning and protected data remains review_required.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not create another mission category engine, health/watch data layer, motion tracking authority path, or consent model.
Keep health/watch, DeviceMotion, camera/pose/face, and location data supportive, minimized, consent-based, fallback-capable, and non-authoritative unless a reviewed task says otherwise.

sourceGroups.name: Familien
supportingConceptFiles: todolist/H2 - BUDDY ALS REALER AR-BEGLEITER UND KI-GUIDE
alreadyStartedInRepo: Mission families such as daily, weekly, adventure, challenge, competition, favorites, and history exist as routes.
Buddy copy and mission bridge areas can support family-friendly explanation patterns.
notYetImplemented: No family account model, child/guardian consent workflow, household leaderboard, shared reward authority, child location tracking, or family camera/face/biometric collection is approved.
Family challenges must remain non-betting, non-payout, privacy-minimized, and review_required for protected data.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not introduce a separate family profile, consent, or household economy system.
Do not add pressure/shame motivation or unsafe child competition mechanics.

sourceGroups.name: Ernährung / Abnehmen
alreadyStartedInRepo: There is general dashboard/mobile analytics and Buddy coaching infrastructure, but no dedicated nutrition/weight-loss product module registered as active.
Privacy guardrails already classify health-adjacent data as sensitive and review-bound.
notYetImplemented: No nutrition tracking, calorie tracking, weight-loss plan, diagnosis, medical recommendation, or diet data model is approved.
No user weight, symptom, medication, biometric, or eating-disorder-sensitive data collection is approved.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not add a nutrition module, food database, weight-loss tracker, or medical coaching engine from concept text without a reviewed scope.
Do not store raw health, weight, symptom, medication, or biometric data in feedback or analytics.

sourceGroups.name: Soziales / AR Battle / Gilden
supportingConceptFiles: todolist/J8.3 - AR RAETSELRALLYE REWARD ALGORITHMUS ADDENDUM.md
alreadyStartedInRepo: Leaderboard, challenge, competition, and mobile mission surfaces exist.
Internal stakes and avatar/rare-item guardrails exist as architecture docs, with economy-preview paths prepared.
notYetImplemented: No betting, payout, real stakes, guild economy, final PvP settlement, or client-authorized competition reward flow is approved.
Guilds/social graph are not registered as active implementation areas yet.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not create a parallel PvP, guild, leaderboard, stake, or payout system.
Keep competitions internal-preview only; no betting, wagering, payout, or financial-equivalent claims.

sourceGroups.name: Business model / B2B / monetization
alreadyStartedInRepo: Public pages, product modules, points shop, marketplace placeholder, analytics page, and internal billing/ledger architecture exist.
Paid points are explicitly documented as backlog/not active.
notYetImplemented: No real billing, checkout, subscription, payment, partner settlement, payout, purchase, or B2B admin module is approved.
Business dashboard expansion remains future scoped work.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not introduce payments, wallet, checkout, partner billing, or B2B admin systems outside reviewed scope.
Do not create a second analytics/business dashboard shell.

sourceGroups.name: Feedback / Analytics / Optimization loop
alreadyStartedInRepo: Analytics page, userAnalytics helper, feedback register, feedback architecture doc, site-quality audit agent, and Stufe-4 workflow register exist.
Feedback API is registered only as proposal/no-live-tracking, with privacy-minimizing aggregate summaries.
notYetImplemented: No live raw feedback database writes, third-party analytics, session replay, heatmaps, raw user-data agent reports, or privacy-sensitive tracking pipeline is approved.
Insight agent remains planned and separated from Dev-Agent/code-writing authority.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not create a second feedback pipeline, tracking layer, analytics SDK integration, consent store, or agent-readable raw-data channel.

Feedback and analytics work must exclude sensitive health/watch, child/minor/family, precise location/GPS/radius/safe-zone, camera/face/pose/biometric, raw motion/sensor, wallet, payment, reward-evidence, permission/consent pressure, and secret data.

sourceGroups.name: WellFit Master Roadmap / Developer To-Do List import
alreadyStartedInRepo: Master roadmap source has been reconciled into project-register/master-roadmap-tasks.json instead of replacing current source-of-truth files.
Imported tasks are mapped to existing Work Map topics and Product Readiness modules where possible.
notYetImplemented: Roadmap items that touch Unity, reward authority, token/NFT/wallet/payment, health/child/location/privacy or compliance remain review-required and are not safe autonomous runtime work.
doNotDuplicateWarnings: Do not create a second roadmap, architecture map, TODO system or agent memory source from the imported roadmap.
Link to existing Work Map/Product Readiness/TODO files when a roadmap item already exists.
